svg.title: Research platform microservice architecture
svg.desc: Full-stack microservice architecture from data sources through ETL, storage, domain services, agent, dashboard, and output reports.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What kinds of APIs are typical data sources for a research platform?')
sendPrompt('What market data feeds are used in financial research pipelines?')
sendPrompt('What databases or file sources feed into an Airflow ETL?')
sendPrompt('What does Airflow do in an ETL pipeline? How is it different from a simple cron job?')
sendPrompt('How is PostgreSQL used in this research platform architecture?')
sendPrompt('What is ChromaDB used for and how does it enable semantic search?')
sendPrompt('How does Neo4j model relationships differently from a relational DB?')
sendPrompt('What does the Research Service do and how does it use the vector store?')
sendPrompt('What does the News Service do in this architecture?')
sendPrompt('What does the Risk Service assess and what signals does it use?')
sendPrompt('What does the Agent Service orchestrate and how does it decide which services to call?')
sendPrompt('What are the trade-offs between Streamlit and Next.js for an AI research dashboard?')
sendPrompt('What goes into a Research Report generated by this pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What does a Risk Analysis output look like from this system?')
sendPrompt('What does Market Insights output contain and who consumes it?')

svg.text: Infrastructure: service discovery · observability · CI/CD · secrets management
